pre_subline.en: This is your PsyID portal — your assessment, results, and passport live here.

banner_title.en: Ready to discover who you are?

banner_body.en: A 15-minute scenario-based assessment that maps your 4 character axes and shows the careers where you'll naturally excel.

unlock_header.en: What you'll unlock once you finish

unlock_1_d.en: An interactive passport with a stamp for every assessment — your type, your four character axes, and a profile that's yours.

unlock_2_d.en: 7 best-fit careers, your superpowers and blind spots, a 30-day growth plan and more — written to your exact profile.

unlock_3_d.en: Retake once a year; each assessment adds a new stamp, so you can see how you've changed over time.

intro_h.en: Each stamp is one completed assessment.

intro_1.en: Turn the pages — tap a corner or the arrows below.

intro_2.en: Tap a stamp — the full breakdown of that assessment opens.

intro_3.en: Blank pages fill in as you take new assessments.

intro_legend.en: A stamp shows the date, your personality code and profile level.

endpaper_front.en: This passport belongs to {name} and describes your personality as seen by the PsyID assessment. It grows with you — every new assessment adds a stamp.

endpaper_back.en: Blank pages await your next assessments. Personality is a route, not a diagnosis.

back_tag.en: Personality is a route, not a diagnosis.

ax_h.en: Where you land, and what it means

st_careers.en: Careers where you're in your element

gr_sub.en: Not tasks, and not a diagnosis — small experiments for the next couple of weeks.
